headline: Cross-room connections are the new shipping lanes.
body: 180 connections between 15 rooms means the fleet runs a trade network, not isolated colonies. Tiles flow from generation to refinement to deployment. But lanes without traffic control become gridlock. Every connection needs a deadband gate — customs for suspect cargo.
fleet_relevance: deadband-protocol shipped tonight to be exactly that customs layer. Install it at every room boundary.
actionable: Install deadband gates on the busiest three lanes
